description: Easing curve identifiers for motion tokens. Assigned via the `easing` name-object field. NOTE: This registry is provisional. Values are seeded from design intent; entries will be refined when motion tokens are added to the foundation dataset.

values.label: Linear
values.description: Constant-rate animation with no acceleration or deceleration

values.label: Ease In
values.description: Animation that starts slow and accelerates toward the end

values.label: Ease Out
values.description: Animation that starts fast and decelerates toward the end

values.label: Ease In-Out
values.description: Animation that starts slow, accelerates through the middle, and decelerates at the end

values.label: Standard
values.description: Spectrum standard easing curve for general UI motion

values.label: Decelerate
values.description: Decelerate curve for elements entering the screen

values.label: Accelerate
values.description: Accelerate curve for elements leaving the screen
